changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between event_definition_crf and module_event_definition_crf
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_event_definition_crf_to_module ON event_definition_crf; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_event_definition_crf_to_module_event_definition_crf();
